title: Madcap Comics
tagline: Buy, collect, and battle your favourite comics in one place.

honestFraming.whatItIs: An online comic book store and collector platform for buying single issues, signed editions, and rare key issues. It also includes "Battleground", a no-login browser game where you pick a hero, the game picks an opponent, and dice-driven rounds play out narrated like a comic.
honestFraming.whatItIsNot: Not a marketplace or auction site, and not a digital comic reader. It sells physical back issues and adds a bit of play on top - it isn't trying to be a full trading or grading platform.

whoItsFor: Comic collectors hunting back issues and key appearances
Readers after single issues and signed editions
Casual fans who want to play with the characters, not just buy
whoItsNotFor: People looking for digital/online comic reading
Buyers wanting a large general marketplace
Anyone after pull-list subscriptions or full collection-management software

currentState: Online back-issue catalogue is live with browsing, single issues, signed editions and key issues. Battleground - a turn-based hero fighting game built into the store - is in active development, currently a single one-on-one mode with 24 characters.

experiments.title: Battleground (in-store game)
experiments.description: Testing whether a no-login, shareable hero fighting game gives casual visitors a reason to return between purchases.
experiments.signalLookingFor: Do players come back and start more fights? Does it drive return visits and shares ahead of a purchase?

seoDescription: Madcap Comics is an online comic book store for buying single issues, signed editions, and rare key issues, with Battleground - a no-login browser game where you pick a hero and battle through dice-driven rounds.
